title: Thumbprint Design System from Thumbtack
content: # Thumbtack Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Biweekly Digest Created by Adobe Alaska Airlines Amazon Apple Atlassian Audi Basis Biings Brainly Carrefour Cash App CBRE Build Cisco Datadog Dell Docplanner eBay Elastic Esri General Electric Github GitLab Google GOV.UK Gusto Helly Hansen IBM Ideagen INPS Kajabi Kiwicom Lemon Squeezy Line LocalTapiola Michelin Microsoft Monday.com MongoDB Motorway Mozilla Nordhealth Ontario Orange Palantir Pinterest Pluralsight Porsche Razorpay Red Hat Rei Salesforce Samsung Seek Segment ServiceNow Shopify Skoda Sprout Social SumUp Sunrise Teamleader Twilio U.S. Web UAE Uber Vercel Visa Washington Post Wikimedia Wise Wonderflow Workday WorkOS Zendesk Keep up with the latest in Design Systems Subscribe Thumbprint from Directories: Components: Thumbprint Design System by Thumbtack is a comprehensive framework aimed at fostering high-quality, consistent user experiences across its products. System includes guidelines for accessibility, a variety of components, and a set of design tokens. Thumbprint is a dynamic system that simplifies the design and development workflow by unifying, standardizing, and thoroughly documenting processes.
